name: compare_split
description: Ring two named London wards on the map at the same time for a side-by-side visual comparison. Use when the operator wants to see, highlight, or put two areas up against each other on the map (as opposed to compare_wards, which speaks the numbers). The map fuzzy-matches each name, so pass them exactly as the operator says.

wardA.description: First London ward to ring, e.g. Catford.

wardB.description: Second London ward to ring, e.g. Lewisham.
